title: Smoky Collards Tagine
description: A hearty and aromatic North African-inspired stew made with tender collards and a blend of smoky spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add collards, smoky, and Tunisian spices. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Cover and simmer for 30 minutes, or until collards are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with parsley if desired.
